result.stdout:
Usage: generatorlog [options] [-- <command> [args...]]

Record Roslyn source generator events to a trace file.

Options:
  --output, -o <path>  Path to the output trace file.
                       Defaults to generators.nettrace in the current directory.
  --pid, -p <pid>      Trace a running process by PID.
  -- <command>         Launch a command and trace it. The command is run as a
                       child process and traced via EventPipe.
  --verbose, -v        Show detailed diagnostic output.

Examples:
  generatorlog -- dotnet build               # Launch and trace a build
  generatorlog --pid 12345                   # Attach to a running process
